chapters.text: Upa keiman numei kilhengnu le achate ho thutah a chu ka-ngailut ahi, keima chang jeng goh hilouva, thutah chu heho chengsen jong,
eiho sunga um jinga chule tonsot geiya um jing dinga thutah jal’a chu,
Pa Pathen le Pa Chapa Jesu Christa a konin lungsetna le hepina chule lungmon nan, thutah le ngailutna a chu eiumpi jing dingu ahi.
Nachate ho lah a koi koi hiuvam kimkhat Pa a kona eihon imuu thupeh bangtah a thutah a achonu kamun kakipah ta ngei jenge.
Chule tua hi numeipha nahenga kahung tao ahi, keiman nahenga thupeh thah kahinsut ahipoi, atil abul’a ineisau thupeh dungjuiya chu, khat le khat ki-ngailut to chehna dingu ahibouve.
Chule eiho athupeh dungjui tah a ichonu le hichu kingailut ahi; nanghon atil abul’a najahsau bang chun chonleu chun hichu hiche thupeh chu ahi.
Ajeh chu vannoiya hin duha milhem lha a tamtah ahung sohdoh tai; amaho chun Jesu Christa chu tahsa a hunga ahi ti ajanom pouve. Hi hi milhem lha a le Christa dou ahi.
Iboldohsa chengseu chu mansah louhel’a naumu’va tohphat man nasan bukimna dingun kivephauvin.
Koi hile Christa thuhil’a um louva akalvala chona chu Pathen neilou ahi; thuhil’a uma vang chun Pa le Chapa chu ania aneikop ahi.
Koi hile chuche thuhil chu polouva nahenguva hung chu na-in’uvah lhunsah dauvin, kamphan jong lem hih hel’un;
ajeh chu koi hile ama kampha lema chu achon gitlou ho jouse chankhompi ahi.
Nahenguva hinsut ding thu tamtah kaneiye, ahivangin lekhapheng le lekha twiya sut kanompoi; nakipanau achamkim theina dingin nahenguva hung ing ting kimaiton kihoulim nau hite, ti kakineme.
Na lhen tumtah nasopinu chaten salam napeuve.
